markets.title: Example referendum passes
markets.canonical_text: The example referendum passes in the 2026 vote.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if the example referendum is officially certified as passing.

markets.title: Example referendum passes by supermajority
markets.canonical_text: The example referendum passes by a supermajority in the 2026 vote.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if the example referendum is certified as passing by the supermajority threshold.

markets.title: Example referendum fails
markets.canonical_text: The example referendum fails in the 2026 vote.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if the example referendum is officially certified as failing.

markets.title: Example central bank cuts rates by June
markets.canonical_text: The example central bank cuts rates by the June meeting.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if a rate cut is announced by the June meeting.

markets.title: Example central bank lowers rates before July
markets.canonical_text: The example central bank lowers rates before July.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if a rate reduction is announced before July, subject to venue-specific wording.
